description: Get Side is a ProtoFlux node that converts the provided Node (BodyNode) from its current side to the Side (Chirality) provided. If given a node that is in the center of the body, then it will return a "None" value. If the Side (Chirality) provided is the current side of the provided Node (BodyNode), no change will occur between the Node (BodyNode) and the * (BodyNode) output.

fields.Node: The node to convert to the provided Side (Chirality).
fields.Side: the side to convert Node (BodyNode) to.
fields.* ([[Type:BodyNode|BodyNode]]): The provided Node (BodyNode) converted to the provided Side (Chirality).
